---
name: Bug Report / Reportar Bug
about: Report a problem with VibeDev or VibeShield / Reportar problema com VibeDev ou VibeShield
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## 🌐 Language / Idioma

- [ ] English
- [ ] Português

## Environment / Ambiente

- Skill: [ ] VibeDev [ ] VibeShield [ ] Other
- Version: (e.g., 3.0.0)
- AI Environment: (e.g., Claude Code 1.x, Cursor 0.x)
- Mode: [ ] Technical / Técnico [ ] Layman / Leigo

## Expected behavior / Comportamento esperado

What you expected to happen. / O que você esperava que acontecesse.

## Observed behavior / Comportamento observado

What actually happened. Paste a snippet of the dialog if possible. / O que aconteceu de fato. Cole trecho do diálogo se possível.

## Steps to reproduce / Passos para reproduzir

1. Command 1: `/vd-start` or natural intent
2. Command 2: ...
3. Observed result: ...

## Logs / State

If any, attach:
- `PROJECT_STATE.md` content (anonymize sensitive data).
- Complete error message.
- Screenshot if applicable.

## Severity / Severidade

- [ ] Critical / Crítico (skill doesn't work)
- [ ] High / Alto (skill works but ignores documented pattern)
- [ ] Medium / Médio (poor UX but recoverable)
- [ ] Low / Baixo (cosmetic or low-frequency)
